name: Causal Loop Diagram
description: Model variables and feedback loops with signed causal links
systemPromptHint: Nodes must be neutral variables that can increase or decrease — never directional statements. Identify and label loops: even number of negative links = reinforcing (R), odd = balancing (B). Focus on 1-3 core loops — diagrams that capture everything lose explanatory power. Mark delays explicitly — they drive oscillation, overshoot, and policy resistance. If only reinforcing loops appear, the model is incomplete.
